summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: (1) Placard Calculator - all 4 test cases passed, (2) AI Smart Search - all 6 backend tests passed for natural language queries, (3) Photo Annotator - page loads correctly with Take Photo and Upload Photo buttons. All existing tools on HazMat Tools tab still work.
passed_tests: Placard Calculator: Table 1 material (Div 2.3 Poison Gas, 100 lbs) shows POISON GAS placard required in ANY quantity
Placard Calculator: Two Table 2 materials (Class 3 800 lbs + Class 8 300 lbs = 1100 lbs) shows FLAMMABLE and CORROSIVE placards with DANGEROUS substitution option
Placard Calculator: Class 9 (500 lbs, non-bulk) shows 'No placards required' with domestic transport exception
Placard Calculator: Single Table 2 material (Class 3, 500 lbs, non-bulk) shows 'No placards required' since under 1,001 lbs
AI Search: POST /api/violations/smart-search with 'driver not wearing seatbelt' returns violations with 392.16
AI Search: POST /api/violations/smart-search with 'cell phone in hand' returns violations with 392.82 and 390.17
AI Search: POST /api/violations/smart-search with 'texting while driving' returns relevant violations
AI Search: Empty query returns empty results
AI Search: Smart search works with additional filters (e.g., oos=Y)
AI Search: Response structure is correct (violations, total, expanded_terms, original_query)
Photo Annotator: Page loads at /photo-annotator with data-testid='photo-annotator'
Photo Annotator: 'Take Photo' button present with data-testid='take-photo-btn'
Photo Annotator: 'Upload Photo' button present with data-testid='upload-photo-btn'
Header: Photo navigation button present with data-testid='photo-annotator-nav-btn'
Existing Tools: Placard Helper, RQ Lookup, Package Class, MOT, Segregation Table all still work on Tools tab
critical_code_review_comments: PlacardCalculator.js correctly implements Table 1 vs Table 2 logic per 172.504
Class 9 domestic exception (172.504(f)(9)) properly applied for non-bulk packages
DANGEROUS placard substitution option correctly shown when 2+ Table 2 categories present
AI smart search system prompt updated with comprehensive natural language mappings
PhotoAnnotator.js has proper canvas-based annotation tools (freehand, circle, arrow, text)
All data-testid attributes present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested: (1) PlacardCalculator in HazMat Tools tab - calculates required placards based on Table 1/Table 2 logic, (2) AI Smart Search at POST /api/violations/smart-search - natural language queries like 'driver not wearing seatbelt' find correct violations, (3) PhotoAnnotator at /photo-annotator - canvas-based photo annotation tool. Key data-testids: placard-calculator, placard-calculator-toggle, add-material-btn, material-class-{n}, material-weight-{n}, calculate-placards-btn, photo-annotator, take-photo-btn, upload-photo-btn, photo-annotator-nav-btn.
